Greek-Entry.English-Entry: διὰ ῥ.πισμοῦ καταψύχειν. γὰρ δὲ καὶ δραπισμοῦ,
ψαινυθίζειν: διὰ ῥιπισμοῦ κ., γῥάφεταἰ δὲ καὶ διὰ πρισμοῦ καταψήχειν.
rain in small drops, drizzle, drip,
to be played to on the harp,
tune played on a stringed instrument,
song sung to the harp, psalm,
sung to the harp, sung of,
ἔνιοι ψάλυγας τὰς λεγομένας ψυχάς, ἄμεινον. καὶ τοὺς ἀσθενεῖς σπινθῆρας,
of the size of a grain of sand,
a fish that buries itself in the sand,
art of extracting gold from sand,
ψαυκρὸν γόνυ: κοῦφον, ἀπὸ τοῦ ἄκρως ψαύειν,
touch as an enemy, lay hands upon,
bringing a false report, lying messenger,
sham-Alexander, an impostor pretending to the name,
to show that he has been wrongly entered in a list of debtors,
built of equal blocks, but in courses of unequal size,
to be elated on unreal grounds,
the offence of falsely subscribing one"s name as witness to a summons
one who falsely subscribes his name as witness to a summons,
to be a false witness, bear false witness,
use of words of similar sound but different meanings,
give the lie to, expose as false,
false moonlight, absence of the moon,
will have made a false statement
under a false name, falsely called,
filled only level with the brim,
cast one"s vote with a pebble:
proposal passed by a majority of votes
measure passed by a popular assembly, decree, act,
one who drives a traffic in
laying of a mosaic pavement, Inscr. gr. et lat. de la Syrie
a small round worn stone, pebble,
that which is carried by vote, a vote,
whisper what one dares not speak out, whisper slanders,
without singing to it, instrumental performer,
soldiers without heavy armour, light troops,
a smooth carpet, a carpet without pile, PCair. Zen.
one who paints with white lead
ἀπορρεῖ τὰ ἀσθενῆ τοῦ καρποῦ, φυλλορρεῖ,
ἱστίον, ὁτὲ δὲ ψίαθος, ἢ μικρὸν ὀρνιθάριον,
you will perish, come to a bad end,
a thing capable of producing sound,
frightened at every noise, shy, timid,
a means of cooling, anything that cools
ἡ μὴ πολλῷ ὕδατι πεφυρμένη μᾶζα,
lead departed souls to the nether world,
attract the souls of the living, win over, persuade, allure,
evocation of souls from the nether world,
a place where departed souls are conjured up,
air-hole, ventilator in the shafts of mines,
leading departed souls to the nether world,
one who cools himself in the shade
of the nature of soul, spiritual,
place where the dead are conjured up,
fight to the last gasp, fight desperately,
a place where departed souls are conjured up,
to be at the last gasp,
to be made cold, become cold,
ἄφοδος ὑγρὰ ἢ ὄνθος, δυσωδία, κτλ.,
a grub that eats the roots of corn,
feed by putting little bits into the mouth,
a slave to morsels of food,
flatterer for morsels of bread, parasite,
one who takes cuffs for the sake of morsels of bread, low parasite,
a disease of trees, scab, Cladosporium herbarum,
a disease of the eyes, excessive dryness attended with itching,
of the nature of the itch, scabby,
πέπαικται ἡ λέξις τῇ Βοιωτῶν διαλέκτῳ,
